text.title: aiops Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for aiops as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Auto-execute all remediation actions without approval gates because "the ML model is 95% accurate."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The 5% of edge cases—where the proposed action is harmful—can cause cascading failures. A restart that fixes a transient issue 95% of the time masks a symptom of a wider outage the other 5%. Human-in-the-loop gates catch those edge cases.

failure-mode.description: Deploy anomaly detection with <1 week of baseline data and static thresholds like "error rate > 1%".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models overfit to noise. 1% error rate might be normal for a particular time of day or service. False alerts erode trust and cause on-call fatigue.
